thought.text: 我看到 `task${task}-pack`。所以每个任务都有自己的打包目标。让我尝试打包所有任务：

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && for i in 0 1 2 3 4 5; do echo "=== Packing task$i ==="; cmake --build build -t task${i}-pack 2>&1 | tail -5; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && for i in 0 1 2 3 4 5; do echo \"=== Packing task$i ===\"; cmake --build build -t task${i}-pack 2>&1 | tail -5; done", "summary": "\u5c1d\u8bd5\u6253\u5305\u6240\u6709\u4efb\u52a1"}
